LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS FTP SECURITIES LLC AND FINANCIAL TECHNOLOGY PARTNERS, L.P'S PETITION FOR PERPETUATION AND PRESERVATION OF EVIDENCE PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROC. SEC. 2035.010 IS DENIED. AN ACTION IS PENDING WHICH PROVIDES MECHANISMS FOR THE RELIEF SOUGHT HERE. CHOOSING ARBITRATION, AS FTP DID HERE, INCLUDES A CHOICE OF THE DISCOVERY METHODS AVAILABLE UNDER SUCH PROCEEDINGS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Verified Petition For Perpetuation And Preservation Of Evidence
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs FTP SECURITIES LLC AND FINANCIAL TECHNOLOGY's Verified Petition For Perpetuation And Preservation Of Evidence is Off calendar. The court denied the petition on July 30, 2012. Pro Tem Judge: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Petitioner'S Petition For Perpetuation And Preservation Of Evidence
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KARL S. KRONENBERGER & ATTY. VIRGINIA SANDERSON OF THE KRONENBERGER/ROSENFELD LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 955-1155 X 113 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
ATTY. LEILA NARVID OF PAYNE & FEARS, TEL. NO. 738-6842 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioners FTP SECURITIES LLC AND FINANCIAL TECHNOLOGY PARTNERS, L.P'S Petition For Perpetuation And Preservation Of Evidence Pursuant to Code of Civil Proc. Sec. 2035.010 is Denied. An action is pending which provides mechanisms for the relief sought here. Choosing arbitration, as FTP did here, includes a choice of the discovery methods available under such proceedings. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/CK)
